nasb.text: You shall put them in one basket, and present them in the basket along with the bull and the two rams.

esv.text: You shall put them in one basket and bring them in the basket, and bring the bull and the two rams.

cnv.text: 你要把這些餅放在籃子裡，用籃子把餅帶來獻上，又把小公牛和兩隻綿羊牽來。

ccb.text: 所有的饼都要用一个篮子盛，连同公牛和绵羊一起带到会幕那里。
